calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Reef Enrichment Substrate Readiness (SD-050 behavioral-diversity env)
items.notes: Env-only 4-arm diagnostic. No trained agent. Validates reef safe zones + food-attracted hazards substrate before V3-EXQ-522 monostrategy-breaking experiment.
